pi_items.source: setup_task.sh python data generation script (choice=0, rt_ms=10-30)
setup_task.sh python data generation script (sub-01 to sub-15)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated delay discounting data generated directly by setup_task.sh. It was verified that the dataset contains exactly 15 valid participants (sub-01 to sub-15) and 1 specifically contaminated participant (sub-99999). The contaminated participant is explicitly generated as a degenerate responder with 100% immediate choices and impossibly fast reaction times (10-30 ms). The expected output and ground truth file paths exactly match the task description and verifier logic.
